reviews.review_description: I wish it will be like i want
The dinosaur realism was lacking big time. Long winding boring road in Fred Flintstones car? I'm sorry but you just need to simplify your ideas. You'll be great tho. Good effort.

They've fixed all sound issues. Ghosting is still present and some Dino's colour texture are weird such as a red or purple T-Rex and some weird all red ankylosaurs that don't look right at all. 3D depth got some improvement but still looks way too flat. IF it gets fixed as real 3D then it will be definetly a WIN.

When attempting to start the dinosaur app the screen goes black and then after a few minutes it I hear the narrator but the screen remains black. No matter how many times I reopen this happens. I am using my galaxy s6 edge phone. Was this made for higher phones? If so that is discouraging. Looking forward to your feedback. Thanks

developer_response.body: Hello lemuria! I'm sorry to confirm that we've dropped support for devices under S7 due to performance issues. Future works will be on the native side and optimized to cover as many devices as possible. Sorry about that.

Hello, fma1987! Sorry to hear that. There's nothing we can do from our end if you can't download the experience. If that's the case it seems like an Oculus related issue, we suggest you contact support and if the problem persists or the issue is somehow in our end, we'll look into it. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This is just a short educational narrated drive explaining a few Dinosaurs.Lasts just minutes. Unfortunately the overall quality isn't good enough to show it as a VR demo to friends ... somehow the aspect scale seems a little bit off... things seem a little too big.

developer_response.body: Hello, Googolkhan! Indeed, this is an educational experience as explained in the store's description. Things might see a little too big because they actually are, please note the dinosaurs are as close to real scale as possible, otherwise it wouldn't be academically relevant.
Thank you for your feedback, Waffles. Care to elaborate a little more? We'd like to hear your opinion!

reviews.review_description:
The animations seem good and the environments seem great.
 But none of that matters as this graphics style (2D, non VR) is nearly unwatchable.  Like going back to SD on a TV set. Just not immersive that way. The dev has some talent clearly, but something like this just has to be 3D, and as many similar experiences are, in sure it could be done. Would probably be 4 stars if so.

developer_response.body: We absolutely understand you, Ted! This project, as it is, is the Gear adaptation of a bigger Rift project. Sadly, the only way to port it was using this format. Future experiences will be native, don't worry. Hope to see you again then!

reviews.review_description: Download it complete but never install.. did it several timea.. my android version is updated.. restart my phone and nothing works..

developer_response.body: Hello Jimmy, thanks for taking the time to write this review. What device and android version are you running?

reviews.review_description:
i'm very disappointed. first thought the app is real-time graphics. as i found out it's a video, I was astonished it's just 2D. 

This has nothing to do with vr. 

I don't have a problem with a good narrated 3D video, but I'm so used to 3D in Vr, (which seems natural)  that when I have to go back to a plain 2d video, it doesn't immerse me or kick me. 

it feels cheap even if you have
crafted your content and put effort in it. it repels me instead of attract me.

just make a stereoscopic experience even if you cut the framerate in half.  it is more important than 60fps. thanks!

developer_response.body: Hello benshine, thanks for your feedback. It's not easy to develop for VR when you have a very strict set of restrictions. In our experience, we can assure you that a 360 stereoscopic experience of this magnitude is hard to manage in an app without streaming (a.k.a. possible additional internet cost) at 60FPS and it is not recommended to "cut the framerate in half" because that introduces motion sickness and it's tiring on the eyes. Don't worry! future experiences will be 100% native with a matching price tag. Again, thanks for your feedback and stay tuned, there's more to come!

reviews.review_description: What a load of dino poo! The app will not install! And before you ask , I have 32g of free memory and I'm using an s8 with the latest Android update! I would not recommend this to anyone
But make it a 3d experience its like watching a 2d 360 video. hope the dev is working on upgrading the app and so on.
It isn't VR, it's a flat 360° video.

reviews.review_title: Nothing In It that makes me say Get It.
reviews.review_description:
I got this not knowing anything about it but it been about dinosaurs and I have to say it is very short under 5 minuets and I don't want to say it but some of the free apps are better looking and longer. I would say give it a miss. If it ends up free then and only then I say give it ago. There isn't really anything in it that makes me want to tell others to get it. Maybe if you have young kids they would like it.

My youtube channel of all the Gear VR apps I've played.
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCD_2bgeRPwyW65XEsM0RKlA
